nextPlan: Continuation: keep 300303 and 600063 while they stay above the 8.57 hard stop and 7.17 trailing-profit line; do not sell strength just because of a normal afternoon pullback.
Risk change: do not add to 600276, 600157, or 002195 until they reclaim MA20 with relative strength; if they lag while A/B candidates confirm, prepare sell-weak/switch-strong review at 14:50.
A candidate: 600584 is the cleanest right-side leader, but only consider it after a controlled pullback or late confirmation that does not chase the intraday high.
B candidate: 688981 needs a firm reclaim and hold above MA20; weak-to-strong condition is hold above MA20 plus no late fade and sector strength remaining intact.
C candidates: 512480 and 588000 can be small ETF probes only on non-extended entries; 300054 is too overheated and 688388 is excluded until DR data normalization is clear.
